task_objective: Generate varied matrices and add data integrity tests
design_decisions: Implemented recursive data integrity check in tests/test_data_integrity.py to ensure no unexecuted Ibis expressions reach the frontend.
Corrected Missingness Matrix logic to ensure it executes its correlation matrix in a batch.
Updated parseMatrixData in default.html to be more robust against nested JSON structures.
Generated varied datasets (Linear, Inverse, Non-linear, Interdependent Nulls) to verify UI rendering of non-binary matrix values.
results: Verified that all matrix types (Pearson, Spearman, Nullity) render correctly with varied values and are backed by proper tests.
